meaning: adj.(直接)生效的,有效率的,能干的
examples: The service at the hotel is efficient and unobtrusive.
Graphite is a highly efficient conductor of electricity.
United dominated the first half without ever hitting top gear against an efficient Villarreal side.
Virgin, with a young, efficient fleet of airliners, does well in most of them.
And, of course, a hybrid or fuel-efficient car emits less carbon dioxide than an SUV.
